ab: Tahkal a mihulul kaku aci ina i anini a remiad.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: Salangdaw sa ku kakarayan i remiadan, carangcang aca ku remiad.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣也風和日麗。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: Maru’ kami a kemaen tu pan i sirengusay a seraan, sadiheku saan ku tireng a mapacidal
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: Salahengan satu ku kakarayan i herek nu kalahukan.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: Palitaen nu maku ci ina, kiya u lahngangay saw ku kulit nu kakarayan?
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空的顏色是紅色的？
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: Suwal satu ci ina, kay a initu ku valiyus.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: Awaay ku kutem i lavii, sadak satu ku vuis.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: I vatad tu sakataluma’ a lalanan, milunguc kaku tu vuis.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: Akaa katayni ku valiyus nasa kaku, a managlay hen kaku a mihulul kiyami.
ch: 希望颱風不要來!我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
